name: the-richest-man-in-babylon
description: George S. Clason's The Richest Man in Babylon — timeless wealth-building principles through the 7 Cures and 5 Laws of Gold
useCase: Helps users build financial discipline through ancient wisdom: save 10%, budget wisely, invest with caution, increase earning power.
knownRisks: The parables are principle-based, not specific financial advice for modern investments
The 10% savings rate is a starting guideline; individual circumstances may require different ratios
